summary: BidBlitz Änderungen Testing Complete - All 6 features verified successfully. WelcomeBonusBanner removed, HowItWorksFloatingButton removed, 'Wie funktioniert's' section in BidBlitzPay removed, VoucherAuctionsSection added on homepage with real voucher data from API.

willkommensbonus_banner_removed.description: WelcomeBonusBanner component is no longer rendered on homepage. Code shows comment: 'Welcome Bonus Banner removed per user request'

how_it_works_floating_button_removed.description: HowItWorksFloatingButton is no longer rendered. Code shows comment: 'HowItWorksFloatingButton removed per user request'

wie_funktioniert_section_bidblitzpay_rem.description: No 'Wie funktioniert's' or 'So funktioniert's' section visible on BidBlitzPay page. Translation keys exist but are not used in UI rendering.

voucher_auctions_section_added.description: VoucherAuctionsSection component added to homepage after 'Entdecke alle Features' banner

details.subtitle: Ersteigere Gutscheine für Restaurants, Bars & mehr!

voucher_auctions_section_content.description: Section displays voucher cards with correct data

api_voucher_auctions_active.description: GET /api/voucher-auctions/active endpoint returns 5 active voucher auctions with product info

response_sample.info: Händler-Gutscheine - Ersteigere Gutscheine für Restaurants, Bars & mehr!

critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 216-217: WelcomeBonusBanner removed with comment
App.js line 210: HowItWorksFloatingButton removed with comment
Auctions.js line 1367-1369: VoucherAuctionsSection imported and rendered after Features banner
VoucherAuctionsSection.js: New component with demo fallback when no real data
voucher_auctions.py /active endpoint: Aggregates vouchers from multiple sources (is_free_auction, restaurant_voucher, voucher category, is_voucher flag)
seed_data_creation: None required - real voucher auctions exist in database

mocked_apis_list: Demo-Vouchers in VoucherAuctionsSection when DB returns empty (fallback only)
mocked_apis.note: Real voucher data is being returned from API - demo vouchers are fallback only

context_for_next_testing_agent: BidBlitz homepage changes complete: 1) WelcomeBonusBanner removed, 2) HowItWorksFloatingButton removed, 3) VoucherAuctionsSection added showing 'Händler-Gutscheine' with real voucher auction data from /api/voucher-auctions/active endpoint. BidBlitzPay page no longer shows 'Wie funktioniert's' section. All changes verified via browser automation and API testing.
